import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut result = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut j = i
      while j < n
        let c = match string.byte_at(line, j)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          32
        end
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
          j = n + 1000
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      end
      mut stop = j
      if stop > n
        stop = n
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, stop)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v > 0
        result = result + v
      else if v < 0
        result = result - v
      end
      i = stop
    end
  end
  println("r=#{result}")
end
